Home › Orange County › Orlando › Halal Restaurants

Halal Restaurants in Orlando

A high rating isn't a clean kitchen — CAFE 34 ISTANBUL proves it here, 4.7 stars on a D grade. That's why each of these 19 restaurants with halal options in Orlando shows its health inspection result, not just its stars.

19 halal restaurants

  • A 100 P
    PIZZANY'S Italian ★ 4.6 (1004) Orlando · Orange County VegGF +2 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • A 98 B
    BOSPHOROUS TURKISH CUISINE Other ★ 4.4 (2315) Orlando · Orange County VeganVeg +7 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 97 G
